title: lappula dubia
intro: Lappula dubia is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, native to China. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Lappula dubia often include infusions, decoctions, or dried flowers, which can be consumed as teas or added to traditional Chinese medicinal formulas.
